"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.toArray = void 0; var reduce_1 = require("./reduce"); var lift_1 = require("../util/lift"); var arrReducer = function (arr, value) { return (arr.push(value), arr); }; function toArray() { return lift_1.operate(function (source, subscriber) { reduce_1.reduce(arrReducer, [])(source).subscribe(subscriber); }); } exports.toArray = toArray; //# sourceMappingURL=toArray.js.map
